duplicated_functionality.description: Identical try/catch blocks with same error response formatting across all controllers
locations: authController.js: register, login, getMe, getPendingUsers, approveUser, rejectUser, getEmployees, getEmployeeById, getEmployeeCampaigns, deleteUser
duplicated_functionality.duplicated_code: try { ... } catch (error) { return res.status(500).json({ message: 'Unable to [action]', error: error.message }); }
duplicated_functionality.suggested_refactor: Create a wrapper function or middleware for standardized error handling

duplicated_functionality.description: Repeated validation checks for required fields and email format
duplicated_functionality.duplicated_code: if (!field || !field.includes('@')) { return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Valid email is required' }); }
duplicated_functionality.suggested_refactor: Create centralized validation utility with reusable validation functions

duplicated_functionality.description: Consistent success/error response formatting across endpoints
duplicated_functionality.duplicated_code:
return res.json({ message: '[success message]', [data]: [data] });
return res.status(400/500).json({ message: '[error message]', error: error.message });

duplicated_functionality.description: Repeated use of protect and adminOnly middleware
duplicated_functionality.suggested_refactor: Create role-based route grouping or wrapper functions

duplicated_functionality.description: Identical JWT token extraction logic in multiple places
duplicated_functionality.suggested_refactor: Extract token extraction to reusable utility function

duplicated_functionality.description: Repeated ISO date string slicing for YYYY-MM-DD format

duplicated_functionality.suggested_refactor: Create validation middleware or utility function

duplicated_functionality.description: Repeated encryption/decryption patterns for SMTP passwords
duplicated_functionality.suggested_refactor: Already well-encapsulated in crypto.js, but usage is consistent - good practice

duplicated_functionality.description: Similar job creation patterns for email sending
locations: Worker implementation (implied in server.js queue event listeners)
duplicated_functionality.duplicated_code: Jobs with name: 'send-email', data containing campaignId, recipientId, userId, recipient, subject, htmlContent, sendingDomain, delaySettings, attachments
duplicated_functionality.suggested_refactor: Create job factory function for consistency

summary: The codebase shows moderate levels of duplicated functionality, primarily in error handling, validation, and response formatting. These represent good opportunities for refactoring to improve maintainability and reduce bugs.
